metadata.title: Mai Samar da Lambar QR Kyauta – PNG & SVG, Ba Buƙatar
metadata.description: Ƙirƙiri lambobin QR don gidajen yanar gizo, vCards, menu ko falayen a cikin daƙiƙu. Fitar da a matsayin PNG & SVG. Tsara launuka da girma. Ba buƙatar rajista.

hero.title: Mai Samar da Lambar QR – Kyauta, Ba Buƙatar Rajista
hero.description: Ƙirƙiri lambar QR don gidan yanar gizo, katin kasuwanci na vCard, imel, waya, ko rubutu. Tsara launuka, girma, da matakin gyaran kuskure, sannan sauke fayil na PNG ko SVG da aka shirya.

third.label: Mai samar da lambar QR kyauta

software.description: Ƙirƙiri lambar QR don gidan yanar gizo, katin kasuwanci, menu, ko falayen. Zaɓi nau'in bayanan, tsara launuka da girma, sannan sauke fayil PNG ko SVG.

howTo.name: Yadda ake amfani da mai samar da lambar QR kyauta
howTo.description: Yadda ake ƙirƙirar lambar QR don gidan yanar gizo, katin kasuwanci na vCard, imel, ko waya - daga zaɓar nau'in bayanan zuwa sauke fayil da aka shirya don bugu.

steps.name: Zaɓi nau'in bayanan
steps.text: Yanke shawara game da abin da lambar QR ya kamata ta ƙunsa: URL, rubutu, katin kasuwanci (vCard), imel, ko lambar waya.

steps.name: Shigar da bayanai
steps.text: Cika filaye masu dacewa. Don URL, shigar da adireshin gidan yanar gizo; don vCard, ba da bayanan tuntubar.

steps.name: Tsara bayyanar
steps.text: Zaɓi girma, margin, launukan lambar da baya, da matakin gyaran kuskure.

steps.name: Sauke lambar
steps.text: Ana iya sauke lambar QR da aka shirya a matsayin fayil PNG (don bugu da yanar gizo) ko SVG (vector, yana canza girma ba tare da asarar inganci ba).

contentBlocks.title: Menene lambar QR kuma yaya take aiki?
contentBlocks.html:
Lambar QR (Quick Response) lambar layi ce ta girma biyu da za a iya duba ta da kyamarar waya. Ba kamar lambobin layi na al'ada ba, lambobin QR suna adana bayanai a kwance da tsaye, wanda ke ba su damar lambar bayanan da suka fi yawa - har zuwa haruffa na alphanumeric kusan 3,000.

An ƙirƙiri lambar QR a shekarar 1994 ta kamfanin Japan Denso Wave (wani ɓangare na ƙungiyar Toyota) don bin diddigin sassan motoci. A yau, ana amfani da lambobin QR sosai a cikin talla, masaukin baƙi, kayan aiki, da sadarwar kasuwanci. Sun sami shahara musamman a lokacin annobar COVID-19, lokacin da gidajen abinci suka fara maye gurbin menu na takarda da lambobin QR.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake amfani da mai samar da lambar QR kyauta
contentBlocks.description: Ƙirƙirar lambar QR yana ɗaukar 'yan daƙiƙu kaɗan kawai:

items.title: 1. Zaɓi nau'in bayanan
items.description: Zaɓi abin da kake son lambar: URL, rubutu, katin kasuwanci na vCard, imel, ko lambar waya.

items.title: 2. Shigar da bayanai
items.description: Cika filaye masu dacewa - adireshin gidan yanar gizo, bayanan tuntubar, ko abun cikin saƙo.

items.title: 3. Sauke lambar
items.description: Tsara bayyanar (launuka, girma, margin) kuma sauke a matsayin PNG ko SVG.

contentBlocks.title: Nau'ikan lambar QR - URL, vCard, imel, waya, rubutu
contentBlocks.description: Mai samar da lambar QR kyauta yana tallafawa nau'ikan bayanai biyar - kowannensu yana da amfani a cikin yanayi daban-daban:

items.title: URL
items.description: Hanyar haɗi zuwa gidan yanar gizo. Bayan duba, waya tana buɗe shafin a cikin browser. Cikakke don katin kasuwanci, falayen, da fastoci.

items.title: Rubutu
items.description: Kowane rubutu har zuwa haruffa 3,000. Bayan duba, waya tana nuna rubutun a kan allo. Yana da amfani don kuɗaɗen rangwame da gajerun umarni.

items.title: Katin kasuwanci na vCard
items.description: Katin kasuwanci na dijital mai bayanan tuntubar (suna, kamfani, waya, imel, adireshi). Bayan duba, waya tana ba da shawarar ajiye lambar. Cikakke don katin kasuwanci na ƙwararru.

items.title: Imel
items.description: Adireshin imel tare da batu da jikin zaɓi. Bayan duba, waya tana buɗe aikace-aikacen wasiƙa tare da tsarin da aka cika tukuna.

items.title: Waya
items.description: Lambar waya. Bayan duba, waya tana ba da shawarar yin kira. Yana da amfani don layukan zafi da tallafin abokin ciniki.

contentBlocks.title: Bayanan fasaha na lambar QR
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
Ƙarfihar zuwa haruffa 4,296
Gyaran kuskure7% – 30%
Ƙaramin girman bugu2 × 2 cm
Ƙaramin bambanci3:1
Marginaƙalla modules 4
contentBlocks.html:
Sanin sigogin fasaha yana taimakawa wajen ƙirƙirar lambobin QR da za a iya karantawa a cikin duk yanayi:

  • Ƙarfin bayanai - lambar QR na iya ɗaukar lambobi har zuwa 7,089, haruffa na alphanumeric 4,296, ko bytes na binary 2,953. A aikace, wannan ya fi isasshe don URLs da katin kasuwanci.
  • Gyaran kuskuren Reed-Solomon - algorithm na lissafi da ke ba da damar karanta lambar ko da wani ɓangare ya lalace ko an rufe shi. Matakan: L (7%), M (15%), Q (25%), H (30%).
  • Margin - yankin fari a kusa da lambar da ake buƙata don ingantaccen duba. Mafi ƙarancin da ake ba da shawara shi ne modules 4 (sassan lambar).
  • Ƙaramin girman bugu - don yanayin duba na al'ada, ya kamata lambar ta kasance aƙalla 2×2 cm. Don bugu mai girma (tutoci, allunan talla), ƙara girma daidai.
  • Bambanci - rabo na bambanci tsakanin lambar da baya ya kamata ya kasance aƙalla 3:1. Mai samar yana gargaɗi ta atomatik game da bambancin da ya yi ƙaranci.

contentBlocks.title: Amfanin lambar QR - katin kasuwanci, falayen, menu na gidan abinci
contentBlocks.description: Lambobin QR suna samun amfani a cikin masana'antu da yanayi da yawa:

items.title: Katin kasuwanci
items.description: Lambar vCard a kan katin kasuwanci tana ba mai karɓa damar ajiye lambar tare da duba guda ɗaya, ba tare da rubuta bayanai da hannu ba.

items.title: Menu na gidan abinci da cafe
items.description: Lambar QR a kan tebur tana kai zuwa menu na dijital. Mafita mai tsabta da ta sami shahara tun daga annobar COVID-19.

items.title: Falayen da fastoci
items.description: Lambar QR tare da hanyar haɗi zuwa shafin kayan, tsarin rajista, ko tayin na musamman.

items.title: Kunshin kayan
items.description: Hanyar haɗi zuwa jagorar mai amfani, katin garanti, ko gidan yanar gizo na masana'anta.

items.title: Ofisoshin likita
items.description: Lambobin QR a kan katin marasa lafiya da ke haɗawa zuwa mashigin marasa lafiya ko tsarin yin alƙawari.

items.title: Gidaje
items.description: Lambobi a kan tutoci da ke haɗawa zuwa cikakken jerin tare da hotunan nunin da cikakkun bayanai.

items.title: Rumfuna da dabaru
items.description: Alamomin QR don bin diddigin tarin kayan, wuraren rumfa, da tarihin jigilar kaya.

items.title: Kasuwanci ta yanar gizo
items.description: Lambobi a kan kunshin da ke haɗawa zuwa umarnin mayar da kayan, bita na abokin ciniki, ko shirye-shiryen aminci.

items.title: Bukukuwa da tarurruka
items.description: Tikiti masu lambobin QR don tabbatar da sauri a ƙofar shiga.

contentBlocks.title: Tsara bayyanar lambar QR
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
Girma300 px
Margin4
Launin lambar
Launin baya
contentBlocks.html:
Mai samar yana ba ka damar tsara sigogin da yawa da ke shafar bayyanar da karanta lambar:

  • Girma (px) - girman lambar a cikin pixels. Don bugu na al'ada (falayen, katin kasuwanci) zaɓi 300–500 px. Don amfani da dijital, 150–200 px ya isa.
  • Margin - yankin fari a kusa da lambar da ake buƙata don ingantaccen duba. Ƙimar da ake ba da shawara ita ce 2–4. Ƙimar 0 na iya sa duba ya yi wahala a kan bayan duhu.
  • Launin lambar QR - baƙi ta asali (#000000). Za ka iya canza shi zuwa kowane launin duhu da ya dace da asalin gani na ka.
  • Launin baya - fari ta asali (#ffffff). Za ka iya canza shi zuwa kowane launin haske. Mai samar zai gargaɗi idan bambanci ya yi ƙaranci.

Shawarar: Kiyaye babban bambanci tsakanin lambar da baya (aƙalla 3:1). Lambar duhu a kan bayan haske tana duba da sauƙi.

contentBlocks.title: Matakan gyaran kuskure - L, M, Q, H
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
L (Ƙasa)7%
M (Matsakaici)15%
Q (Kwata)25%
H (Babba)30%
contentBlocks.html:
Gyaran kuskure tsari ne da ke ba da damar karanta lambar QR ko da wani ɓangarenta ya lalace, ya ƙazantu, ko an rufe shi. Mai samar yana amfani da algorithm na Reed-Solomon, wanda shine al'ada a cikin lambobin QR.

  • L (Ƙasa) - 7% - mafi ƙarancin sake maimaitawa, lambar ta fi ƙanƙanta. Zaɓi lokacin da za a yi amfani da lambar a cikin yanayi mafi kyau (allo, bugu mai inganci).
  • M (Matsakaici) - 15% - ƙimar asali, kyakkyawan daidaito tsakanin ƙarfi da juriya. Ya dace da yawancin amfani.
  • Q (Kwata) - 25% - babbar juriya ga lalacewa. Zaɓi don lambobi da aka buga a kan kayan da suka saba da ƙazanta.
  • H (Babba) - 30% - mafi girman juriya. Ana ba da shawara don kayan bugu na waje, kunshin, da yanayi inda za a iya rufe wani ɓangaren lambar (misali, alama a tsakiya).

Bayanan kula: Babban matakin gyara yana nufin lambar ta fi girma kuma ta fi rikitarwa. Tare da yawan bayanai da matakin H, lambar na iya zama mai yawa sosai.

contentBlocks.title: PNG vs SVG - wane tsari za a zaɓa don bugu?

features.name: Gidajen yanar gizo da kafofin watsa labarai
Canza girma ba tare da asarar inganci ba

contentBlocks.title: Shawarwarin bugu na lambar QR
contentBlocks.description: Don tabbatar da lambar QR za a iya karantawa bayan bugu, bi ƙa'idoji kaɗan:

items.title: Ƙaramin girma
items.description: Ya kamata lambar ta kasance aƙalla 2×2 cm don duba a kusa. Yawan nisan duba, girman lambar da ake buƙata.

items.title: Bambanci
items.description: Lambar duhu a kan bayan haske. Guje wa launukan pastel da ƙarancin bambanci.

items.title: Margin a kusa da lambar
items.description: Kiyaye sararin fanko a kusa da lambar. Kada ka sanya sauran abubuwan zane kusa sosai - margin yana da muhimmanci don ingantaccen duba.

items.title: Gwaji
items.description: Kafin bugu da yawa, gwada lambar a kan wayoyin daban-daban kuma a cikin yanayin haske daban-daban.

items.title: Matakin gyara
items.description: Don bugu na waje da kayan da suka saba da lalacewa, zaɓi matakin Q ko H.

contentBlocks.title: Menene ke sa mai samar da lambar QR ya bambanta?

items.title: Samarwa na gida a cikin browser
items.description: Ba a aika bayanan da aka shigar a cikin mai samar zuwa kowane sabar ba - ana yin dukan sarrafa a cikin na'urar ka ta gida.

items.title: Nau'ikan bayanai biyar a cikin kayan aiki guda ɗaya
items.description: URL, rubutu, katin kasuwanci na vCard, imel, da waya - kowane nau'i yana samar da lambar QR a cikin al'adar da ta dace.

items.title: Tsara bayyanar lambar QR
items.description: Launukan lambar da baya, girma a cikin pixels, margin, da matakin gyaran kuskure - ana iya tsara kowane sigogi.

items.title: Matakan gyaran kuskure huɗu
items.description: Algorithm na Reed-Solomon yana ba ka damar zaɓar juriyar lambar ga lalacewa - daga 7% (L) zuwa 30% (H). Matakan da suka fi girma suna da amfani don bugu a kan kayan da suka saba da ƙazanta.

items.title: Duban kai tsaye
items.description: Kana ganin sakamakon nan da nan bayan shigar da bayanai, ba tare da danna "Samar" ba.

items.title: Fitarwa ta PNG da SVG
items.description: Sauke lambar a cikin tsarin da ya dace da amfanin ka.

contentBlocks.title: Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi game da mai samar da lambar QR

items.question: Shin lambar QR da aka samar da wannan kayan aikin tana ƙarewa?
items.answer: A'a. Lambar QR ta tsaye (kamar wadda wannan kayan aikin ke samarwa) ba ta ƙarewa. Abun cikin - misali, URL ko bayanan katin kasuwanci - an lambar su kai tsaye a cikin lambar. Muddin shafin da aka nufa yana nan, lambar za ta yi aiki.
items.answerSchemaText: A'a. Lambobin QR na tsaye ba sa ƙarewa. Ana lambar abun cikin kai tsaye a cikin lambar.

items.question: Zan iya canza URL a cikin lambar QR da ke akwai?
items.answer: Tare da lambar QR ta tsaye, ba za ka iya canza abun cikin da aka lambar ba - kana buƙatar samar da sabuwar lambar tare da sabon adireshi. Lambobin QR na motsi (da za a iya gyarawa bayan samarwa) suna buƙatar sabis na waje masu biyan kuɗi.
items.answerSchemaText: A'a, ba za a iya gyara lambobin QR na tsaye ba. Samar da sabuwar lambar don URL daban.

items.question: PNG ko SVG - wane tsari na lambar QR ya kamata in zaɓa don bugu?
items.answer: PNG yana aiki don yawancin amfani: gidajen yanar gizo, kafofin watsa labarai, bugu har zuwa girman A4. SVG yana tushen vector - ana iya canza girma zuwa kowane girma ba tare da asarar inganci ba, wanda ya sa ya dace da tutoci, allunan talla, da manyan tsare-tsaren talla.
items.answerSchemaText: PNG don yanar gizo da bugu na al'ada. SVG don girma mai girma da canza girma ba tare da asara ba.

items.question: Wane girman lambar QR ya kamata in zaɓa don katin kasuwanci?
items.answer: Don kayan da aka buga (katin kasuwanci, falayen), ya kamata lambar ta kasance aƙalla 2×2 cm, mafi kyau 3×3 cm. A cikin mai samar, wannan ya dace da ƙudurin 300 px a ingancin bugu na al'ada (300 DPI). Don manyan tsare-tsare (fastoci, tutoci), zaɓi girma mai girma ko tsarin SVG.
items.answerSchemaText: Aƙalla 2×2 cm (300 px a 300 DPI). Mafi kyau 3×3 cm don katin kasuwanci.

items.question: Zan iya ƙara alama a tsakiyar lambar QR?
items.answer: Wannan kayan aikin ba ya tallafawa ƙara alama kai tsaye. Duk da haka, za ka iya sauke lambar a tsarin SVG kuma ka ɗora alama a cikin shirin zane - a wannan yanayin, ya zama dole a saita babban matakin gyaran kuskure (H) domin lambar ta kasance ana iya karantawa duk da an rufe wani ɓangare.
items.answerSchemaText: Ba kai tsaye ba. Sauke SVG kuma ƙara alama a cikin shirin zane tare da gyaran kuskuren H.

items.question: Me ya sa lambar QR ta ba ta duba bayan bugu?
items.answer: Dalilai mafi yawa: ƙarancin bambanci tsakanin lambar da baya, girman lambar ya yi ƙanƙanta, rashin margin a kusa da lambar, ko lalacewar bugu. Gwada ƙara girma, inganta bambanci, da ƙara matakin gyaran kuskure (Q ko H).
items.answerSchemaText: Duba bambanci, girma, margin, da matakin gyaran kuskure.

items.question: Zan iya amfani da lambobin QR da aka samar don kasuwanci?
items.answer: Eh. Ana iya amfani da lambobin QR da aka samar a cikin kowane aiki - na kasuwanci da na rashin kasuwanci, ba tare da ƙuntatawan lasisi ba.
items.answerSchemaText: Eh, ba tare da ƙuntata ba a cikin ayyukan kasuwanci da na rashin kasuwanci.

items.question: Menene bambanci tsakanin katin kasuwanci na vCard da lambar QR ta rubutu?
items.answer: Lambar QR ta vCard tana ɗauke da bayanan tuntubar a cikin tsari na al'ada (suna, kamfani, waya, imel, adireshi). Bayan duba, waya tana ba da shawarar ajiye lambar a cikin littafin adireshi ta atomatik. Lambar rubutu tana nuna bayanai a matsayin rubutu na al'ada - ba tare da zaɓin ajiye ta atomatik ba.
items.answerSchemaText: vCard tana ajiye lambar ta atomatik. Lambar QR ta rubutu tana nuna rubutu kawai.
